bids.contractor: Constructora Los Cabos S.A. de C.V.
bids.notes: Established contractor with 3 completed projects in Residencial Vista del Mar. Pre-approved by development. Quoted includes HOA compliance documentation support. Minor concern: timeline of 13 months is on the longer end but reflects quality focus.

Faster timeline (11 months) and higher finishes quality rating per references. Development pre-approval status: pending verification with Residencial Vista del Mar. Higher bid but includes more comprehensive MEP and finishes package.

recommendation: Constructora Los Cabos S.A. de C.V.
recommendation_rationale: Constructora Los Cabos S.A. de C.V. is recommended at USD 590,000 — USD 45,000 below BCS Builders Group. Both bids fall within the client's budget range (USD 400,000–700,000). The recommended contractor has verified pre-approval from Residencial Vista del Mar (3 completed projects in the development), which is a significant advantage for a project with strict HOA requirements. The 2-month longer timeline is a manageable tradeoff for the cost savings and the reduced HOA compliance risk. BCS Builders Group's development pre-approval is unconfirmed, which introduces coordination risk at a critical stage. Recommend proceeding with Constructora Los Cabos.
